test-method.name: createStory_validPayload_returns201
test-method.description: POST /api/stories with valid user, title, content returns 201 and story object

exception.message: 1 expectation failed. Expected status code <401> but was <201>.
exception.full-stacktrace:

test-method.name: getAllStories_returnsListNewestFirst
test-method.description: GET /api/stories returns all stories ordered by newest first

test-method.name: getStoryById_existingId_returns200
test-method.description: GET /api/stories/{id} for existing story returns 200 and story details

test-method.name: getStoriesByUser_validUser_returnsList
test-method.description: GET /api/stories/user/{userId} returns all stories by that user

test-method.name: getStoriesByUser_noStories_returnsEmptyList
test-method.description: GET /api/stories/user/{userId} for user with no stories returns empty list

test-method.name: searchStories_validKeyword_returnsMatches
test-method.description: GET /api/stories/search?keyword=X returns stories matching title keyword

test-method.name: searchStories_noMatch_returnsEmptyList
test-method.description: GET /api/stories/search?keyword=X with no match returns empty list

test-method.name: updateStory_validPayload_returns200
test-method.description: PUT /api/stories/{id} with updated title and content returns 200
